Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Megadev: A Development Kit for the Sega Mega Drive and Mega CD Hardware 116 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. Library of Short Stories 26 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Generalizing Knuth's Pseudocode Architecture From Algorithms to Knowledge 25 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Postgres with Builtin File Systems 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. A Recursive Algorithm to Render Signed Distance Fields 38 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. Show HN: GitAgent – An open standard that turns any Git repo into an AI agent 87 upvotes, 12 comments
  7. Baochip-1x: What it is, why I'm doing it now and how it came about 261 upvotes, 49 comments
  8. CSMWrap: Legacy BIOS booting on UEFI-only systems via SeaBIOS 29 upvotes, 3 comments
  9. Bumblebee queens breathe underwater to survive drowning 23 upvotes, 3 comments
  10. An interactive presentation about the Grammar of Graphic 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. Marketing for Founders 87 upvotes, 24 comments
  12. Python: The Optimization Ladder 256 upvotes, 92 comments
  13. Sunsetting Jazzband 130 upvotes, 42 comments
  14. Learning Creative Coding 23 upvotes, 4 comments
  15. Anthropic invests $100M into the Claude Partner Network 50 upvotes, 15 comments
  16. Show HN: Han – A Korean programming language written in Rust 69 upvotes, 26 comments
  17. Fedora 44 on the Raspberry Pi 5 45 upvotes, 16 comments
  18. The Sound of Contamination: Headphones Contain Ing Hormone-Disrupting Chemicals 20 upvotes, 5 comments
  19. Show HN: Ichinichi – One note per day, E2E encrypted, local-first 56 upvotes, 24 comments
  20. Claude March 2026 usage promotion 165 upvotes, 103 comments
  21. Changes to OpenTTD Distribution on Steam 88 upvotes, 50 comments
  22. An ode to bzip 85 upvotes, 53 comments
  23. Ageless Linux. We are legally required to ask how old you are. We won't 124 upvotes, 84 comments
  24. Montana passes Right to Compute act (2025) 233 upvotes, 202 comments
  25. Hostile Volume – A game about adjusting volume with intentionally bad UI 70 upvotes, 52 comments
  26. XML is a cheap DSL 231 upvotes, 238 comments
  27. Offloading FFmpeg with Cloudflare 18 upvotes, 11 comments
  28. Making your JITted Code known: Let me count the ways 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Starlink militarization and its impact on global strategic stability 113 upvotes, 153 comments
  30. 9 Mothers Defense (YC P26) Is Hiring in Austin 0 upvotes, 0 comments
